scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres minio mailpit
scripts.openapi:generate: pnpm --filter @camp-registration/api run openapi:write && openapi-typescript packages/contracts/openapi/openapi.json -o packages/contracts/src/generated.ts
scripts.test:e2e:server: docker compose up -d --wait postgres && MIGRATION_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://camp:camp@127.0.0.1:5432/camp_registration pnpm db:migrate && MIGRATION_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://camp:camp@127.0.0.1:5432/camp_registration pnpm db:seed && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://camp_app:camp-app-local@127.0.0.1:5432/camp_registration LOCAL_AUTH_ENABLED=true LOCAL_ACTOR_ID=e2e-camp-admin LOCAL_ORGANIZATION_ID=a60b272f-b028-4f1a-b666-3ef3cffd9827 API_INTERNAL_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 pnpm dev
